prerequisites: A Ticket Tailor account with access to your box office settings.
An API key generated from your box office API settings (manage keys at https://app.tickettailor.com/box-office/api). Keys are prefixed with sk_.
Network access to the production API base URL https://api.tickettailor.com.

authMethods.name: API key (HTTP Basic Auth)
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with the api_key secret field. The Ticket Tailor API uses HTTP Basic Auth: the API key is sent either as a Base64-encoded Authorization header (Authorization: Basic Base64Encode(api_key)) or as the basic auth username with an empty password (a trailing colon, e.g. -u 'sk_...:'). Provide the key in the api_key field and the connector handles the Basic Auth encoding.

setupSteps.title: Generate an API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Ticket Tailor and open your box office API settings at https://app.tickettailor.com/box-office/api. Create an API key and copy it. Keys begin with the sk_ prefix. Store the key securely, as it grants access to your box office data.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key to the connector
setupSteps.body: Set the required api_key config field to the key you generated. This is the only field the source-tickettailor connector requires. The connector sends it via HTTP Basic Auth against the production API at https://api.tickettailor.com.

sources.title: Ticket Tailor API (developer docs, authentication and base URL)
